title: Create: Recycled
description: Adds crushing wheel recipes for recycling Create components
body:
# Create: Recycled
Have you ever accidentally crafted the wrong components you never needed? Would you want to salvage components from your old contraptions to make new ones? Then luckily for you, this addon does just that!

**Create: Recycled** adds recipes for the crushing wheel and allows you to grind down your contraptions into their base parts for reuse! Works best with structure mods like Create: Strucutres Arise.

## Dependencies
- Create
